nasb.text: The Lord of hosts will prepare a lavish banquet for all peoples on this mountain; A banquet of aged wine, choice pieces with marrow, And refined, aged wine.

esv.text: On this mountain the Lord of hosts will make for all peoples a feast of rich food, a feast of well-aged wine, of rich food full of marrow, of aged wine well refined.

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華必在這山上為萬民擺設豐盛美筵，有陳酒、滿髓的肥甘和醇美好酒。

ccb.text: 在锡安山上，万军之耶和华必为天下万民摆设丰盛的宴席，有陈年佳酿和精选的美食。

csbs.text: 在这山上， 万军之耶和华必为万民摆设肥美之宴， 就是有陈酒、有满带骨髓的肥美食物、有精酿陈酒的宴席。
